landing.heroSubtitle: Sommar uses AI to create genuine connections between people at in-person events. No swiping, no engagement algorithms. Just real people meeting.
landing.statsTitle: The world is more connected and lonelier than ever
landing.statLoneliness: {percentage}% of young adults report significant loneliness
landing.statDatingBurnout: {percentage}% of dating app users report emotional burnout
landing.antidoteTitle: The antidote already exists. It's called presence.
landing.antidoteDescription: In-person events are the only place where real human chemistry happens. Sommar amplifies that with AI that truly understands who you are.
landing.howItWorksStep1Description: Our AI has a real conversation with you to understand who you truly are. No boring forms.
landing.howItWorksStep2Description: A dimensional profile that captures your essence. It's not a dating profile. It's you, in layers.
landing.howItWorksStep3Description: At the event, see who's there and discover who the AI thinks you should meet.
landing.howItWorksStep4Description: Break the ice with messages that expire. No pressure, with intentionality.
landing.notJustDatingDescription: Friendships, creative partnerships, professional connections. You choose which facets to activate at each event.
landing.forOrganizersDescription: Transform your event into a connection experience. Engagement before, during and after. Real networking data. Zero cost to start.
landing.forOrganizersCta: I want this for my event
landing.emailCaptureSuccess: Noted! You'll be among the first to know.
landing.emailCaptureError: Oops, something went wrong. Try again?

auth.loginSubtitle: Create real connections at real events

onboarding.matterGreeting1: Hi! I'm Matter, the intelligence behind Sommar.
onboarding.matterGreeting2: My role is to truly get to know you so I can create connections that make sense for you.
onboarding.matterGreeting3: I'll ask you a few questions. There are no right or wrong answers, okay? I just want to understand you.
onboarding.archetypeTitle: Choose at least 3 aesthetics that represent you
onboarding.archetypeSubtitle: This helps Matter understand your vibe
onboarding.facetTitle: What kind of connections are you looking for?
onboarding.facetSubtitle: You can change this anytime and at each event
onboarding.oriRevealDescription: This is your dimensional profile. It evolves with you, with every conversation, every event.

meta.siteTitle: Sommar - Real connections at real events
meta.siteDescription: Sommar uses AI to create genuine connections between people at in-person events. Friendships, romance, partnerships. It all starts with presence.
